SOFTLIGHTEASE.Fields.enabled.label: Enable Light Ease
SOFTLIGHTEASE.Fields.enabled.hint: Apply the module's custom transition shader to this ambient light. When disabled, Foundry's normal attenuation is used.
SOFTLIGHTEASE.Fields.inner.label: Bright to Dim Ease
SOFTLIGHTEASE.Fields.inner.hint: Controls how broadly the bright region blends into dim light. If you leave it alone, the current attenuation value of {ease} is a good starting point.
SOFTLIGHTEASE.Fields.outer.label: Dim to Dark Ease
SOFTLIGHTEASE.Fields.outer.hint: Controls how early the light starts fading from dim light into darkness. If you leave it alone, the current attenuation value of {ease} is a good starting point.
SOFTLIGHTEASE.Fields.curve.label: Easing Curve
SOFTLIGHTEASE.Fields.curve.hint: Choose the interpolation curve used for both transitions.
SOFTLIGHTEASE.Note: This tab only affects ambient lights with Light Ease enabled. It preserves Foundry's existing light animations, but replaces the bright-to-dim and dim-to-dark transition math for that light.
SOFTLIGHTEASE.Unavailable: Light Ease is only available for regular ambient lights. Darkness sources continue to use their normal Foundry behavior.
